title: astragalus angustifolius subsp. euangustifolius
intro: Astragalus angustifolius subsp. euangustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaf astragalus, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including enhancing immune function, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. Astragalus angustifolius subsp. euangustifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a broader range of health benefits.
